problem id: 792a5ccd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10110010 -> 01100001
  11011101 -> 10111100
  00001100 -> 00011000
  01101011 -> 11010101
  11110010 -> 11100011
  01100011 -> 11000101
  11001110 -> 10011010
  11000100 -> 10001110
  10001000 -> 00010100
  00110000 -> 01100001

query: 11010101
predicted answer: 10101100
